exit_criteria: New session handoff semantics are documented in owning system specs.
Executable delta is covered by TASK-074.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Fresh validation is preferred; policy may require it for high-risk semantic gates.

next_loop.reason: The next compiler loop should start from the build handoff, not the producing compiler context.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

requirements.text: Agency and compiler routing can request a new/fresh session or context reset when policy requires it without asking the user to do it manually.
Pi adapter exposes session replacement using Pi command-context ctx.newSession via a tool/command bridge.
Session-control contract is adapter-neutral for future harness-specific clear-context/spawn mechanisms.

evidence_mapping.evidence: adapters.md and api.md define session handoff modes and capability.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Agency no longer relies on manual /new
evidence_mapping.evidence: agency.md and compilers.md instruct using adapter session handoff for required boundaries.
documentation records Pi command-context ctx.newSession bridge as adapter mapping.

summary: Document adapter-managed session handoff capability for agency and isolation boundaries.
knowledge_changes: .codewiki/kb/system/adapters.md: defines adapter-neutral session handoff modes and Pi mapping to ctx.newSession bridge
.codewiki/kb/system/agency.md: agency may spend session budget via adapter session handoffs instead of asking user to run host commands
.codewiki/kb/system/api.md: adds codewiki.session_handoff capability and write rule
.codewiki/kb/system/compilers.md: automated compilers use adapter session handoff for required fresh boundaries
.codewiki/kb/system/validation-gateway.md: validator session starts from handoff refs rather than builder chat
skills/codewiki/SKILL.md: router lists codewiki_session_handoff and fresh-boundary rule
skills/codewiki-implementation/SKILL.md: implementation/validation use handoff when available
skills/codewiki-verify/SKILL.md: verifier treats handoff refs as boundary
roadmap_changes: TASK-074 refined to include session handoff control after accepted scope change
assumptions: A tool may queue a command as follow-up because Pi tools cannot call ctx.newSession directly.
